caption: A woman with her hair tied back in a bun is seated in a recording studio, wearing a black t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind her is a white wall featuring a screen displaying the word "ohnson" in red and a sign that reads "Employees Only". To her right, a yellow vertical stripe borders a black wall. On-screen graphics include a logo with the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, speaking and shifting her facial expressions. Her gaze moves slightly and her mouth opens and closes as she talks, while her head tilts subtly between the frames. The background and equipment remain stationary, and the on-screen logos stay fixed in their positions.
